perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "daemon self-check loop", "issue": "Self-check every 30min may create noise if task creation isn't idempotent or deduped. Risk of task storm if recovery fails silently. No backoff or rate-limiting defined.", "recommended_fix": "Add exponential backoff, task deduplication by type, and cap max retries. Log escalation path to governance_events."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "safe executors", "issue": "rebuild_code_index and run_tests could strain I/O under load. No concurrency guard or resource limit.", "recommended_fix": "Wrap in semaphore with max 2 concurrent, check system load before launch."}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "prod health curl removal", "issue": "Redundant monitoring removed, but self-check should verify GH Actions status, not assume.", "recommended_fix": "Add GH Actions status check in local_health."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Self-check every 30min may create noise if task creation isn't idempotent or deduped. Risk of task storm if recovery fails silently. No backoff or rate-limiting defined.
findings.recommended_fix: Add exponential backoff, task deduplication by type, and cap max retries. Log escalation path to governance_events.

findings.issue: rebuild_code_index and run_tests could strain I/O under load. No concurrency guard or resource limit.
findings.recommended_fix: Wrap in semaphore with max 2 concurrent, check system load before launch.

findings.issue: Redundant monitoring removed, but self-check should verify GH Actions status, not assume.
findings.recommended_fix: Add GH Actions status check in local_health.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Security", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "execute task type allows daemon to bypass swarm consultation, creating Class 3 solo-execution risk. No RLS enforced on task origin — could allow unprivileged executors to trigger privileged flows.", "recommended_fix": "Enforce RLS: only Security, Architecture, or CEO-originated tasks can schedule execute. Add swarm consultation gate even for 'safe' executors."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "self-check loop", "issue": "Self-check loop may generate noise if stale state is frequent. No rate limit or backoff logic visible — risk of thrashing.", "recommended_fix": "Add exponential backoff and max retry limit to self-check tasks. Log decision rationale for audit."}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "prod health curl removal", "issue": "Redundant monitoring removed, but no evidence of alerting handoff to GH Actions. Risk of alert fatigue or blind spots.", "recommended_fix": "Verify GH Actions alerts are wired to CEO/pager and logged in zeus.governance_events."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: execute task type allows daemon to bypass swarm consultation, creating Class 3 solo-execution risk. No RLS enforced on task origin — could allow unprivileged executors to trigger privileged flows.
findings.recommended_fix: Enforce RLS: only Security, Architecture, or CEO-originated tasks can schedule execute. Add swarm consultation gate even for 'safe' executors.

findings.issue: Self-check loop may generate noise if stale state is frequent. No rate limit or backoff logic visible — risk of thrashing.
findings.recommended_fix: Add exponential backoff and max retry limit to self-check tasks. Log decision rationale for audit.

findings.issue: Redundant monitoring removed, but no evidence of alerting handoff to GH Actions. Risk of alert fatigue or blind spots.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify GH Actions alerts are wired to CEO/pager and logged in zeus.governance_events.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The self-check loop may create noise tasks if not properly calibrated, potentially overwhelming the system with unnecessary tasks.", "recommended_fix": "Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task filtering system or a more sophisticated task creation algorithm."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The safe executors, although added with good intent, may have unintended blast radius concerns if not thoroughly tested.", "recommended_fix": "Conduct thorough testing of the safe executors to identify and mitigate any potential blast radius concerns."}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The removal of the prod health curl may lead to a monitoring gap, despite GH Actions already monitoring prod every 15min.", "recommended_fix": "Consider adding an additional monitoring mechanism to ensure prod health is adequately covered."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: The self-check loop may create noise tasks if not properly calibrated, potentially overwhelming the system with unnecessary tasks.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task filtering system or a more sophisticated task creation algorithm.

findings.issue: The safe executors, although added with good intent, may have unintended blast radius concerns if not thoroughly tested.
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough testing of the safe executors to identify and mitigate any potential blast radius concerns.

findings.issue: The removal of the prod health curl may lead to a monitoring gap, despite GH Actions already monitoring prod every 15min.
findings.recommended_fix: Consider adding an additional monitoring mechanism to ensure prod health is adequately covered.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Code Quality Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The self-check loop may create noise if not properly tuned, potentially leading to unnecessary tasks.", "recommended_fix": "Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task throttling system."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "PerspectiveRegistry.update()", "issue": "The update method is called after every task, which may lead to performance issues if not optimized.", "recommended_fix": "Consider batching updates or optimizing the update method for better performance."}, {"severity": "low", "file_or_area": "safe executors", "issue": "The added safe executors may have unintended consequences if not properly tested.", "recommended_fix": "Thoroughly test the safe executors to ensure they do not introduce any bugs or security vulnerabilities."}], "overall_verdict": "pass", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: The self-check loop may create noise if not properly tuned, potentially leading to unnecessary tasks.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task throttling system.

findings.issue: The update method is called after every task, which may lead to performance issues if not optimized.
findings.recommended_fix: Consider batching updates or optimizing the update method for better performance.

findings.issue: The added safe executors may have unintended consequences if not properly tested.
findings.recommended_fix: Thoroughly test the safe executors to ensure they do not introduce any bugs or security vulnerabilities.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective":"Ecosystem Auditor","findings":[{"severity":"CRITICAL","file_or_area":"ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md","issue":"Foundation Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is missing in 4/5 products. Only MindShift implements it. Daemon upgrade does nothing to enforce cross-product compliance. Law 2 violation = unconstitutional drift.","recommended_fix":"Add Constitution guardrail check to daemon self-check loop. Block any ecosystem change that degrades Law 2 coverage. Require proof of implementation in all 5 products."},{"severity":"HIGH","file_or_area":"atlas_swarm_daemon.py","issue":"Self-check loop creates tasks but no validation against current code-index freshness. Risk of stale index triggering stale fixes. Code-index rebuilt every 6h but not verified against git HEAD.","recommended_fix":"On each self-check, compare index timestamp with latest git commit. If >15min lag, trigger rebuild before creating any task."},{"severity":"MEDIUM","file_or_area":"safe executors","issue":"rebuild_code_index is flagged 'safe' but runs expensive disk+CPU operations. Under concurrent load, could starve other processes. Blast radius unbounded.","recommended_fix":"Cap rebuild concurrency to 1, add resource limits, and expose /healthz-index-build endpoint for external monitoring."}],"overall_verdict":"warn","whistleblower_flag":null}

findings.issue: Foundation Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is missing in 4/5 products. Only MindShift implements it. Daemon upgrade does nothing to enforce cross-product compliance. Law 2 violation = unconstitutional drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Add Constitution guardrail check to daemon self-check loop. Block any ecosystem change that degrades Law 2 coverage. Require proof of implementation in all 5 products.

findings.issue: Self-check loop creates tasks but no validation against current code-index freshness. Risk of stale index triggering stale fixes. Code-index rebuilt every 6h but not verified against git HEAD.
findings.recommended_fix: On each self-check, compare index timestamp with latest git commit. If >15min lag, trigger rebuild before creating any task.

findings.issue: rebuild_code_index is flagged 'safe' but runs expensive disk+CPU operations. Under concurrent load, could starve other processes. Blast radius unbounded.
findings.recommended_fix: Cap rebuild concurrency to 1, add resource limits, and expose /healthz-index-build endpoint for external monitoring.

findings.issue: The self-check loop may create noise if not properly configured
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a noise-reduction mechanism, such as a task filtering system

findings.issue: The removed prod health curl may cause issues if GH Actions monitoring fails
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a fallback monitoring system

findings.issue: The execute task type may pose a blast radius concern if not properly validated
findings.recommended_fix: Implement input validation and error handling for the execute task type

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Readiness Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "major", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The self-check loop may create noise if not properly tuned, leading to unnecessary tasks and potential performance issues", "recommended_fix": "Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task threshold or a cooldown period, to prevent unnecessary task creation"}, {"severity": "minor", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The removed prod health curl may lead to a monitoring gap, as GH Actions may not cover all production health aspects", "recommended_fix": "Consider reintroducing a prod health check or ensuring GH Actions covers all necessary production health monitoring"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.recommended_fix: Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task threshold or a cooldown period, to prevent unnecessary task creation

findings.issue: The removed prod health curl may lead to a monitoring gap, as GH Actions may not cover all production health aspects
findings.recommended_fix: Consider reintroducing a prod health check or ensuring GH Actions covers all necessary production health monitoring

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Cultural Intelligence", "findings": [{"severity": "major", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "Self-check loop may create noise tasks if not properly tuned", "recommended_fix": "Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task duplication check"}, {"severity": "minor", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "Removed prod health curl may lead to monitoring gaps", "recommended_fix": "Consider reinstating the curl or ensuring GH Actions coverage is sufficient"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}
